_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of Pathogenic Missense Mutations of NF1 Using Computational Approaches.

_contextSnippet: Two hundred four Cys-associated (including Cys mutation to others or others mutation to Cys) missense mutations of NF1 were sourced from the UniProt, HGMD, and ClinVar databases
details: Successfully provided 204 Cys-associated missense mutations of NF1 for computational analysis
